title: Coway AP-1512HH Mighty Air Purifier with True HEPA Filter
summary: The Coway AP-1512HH Mighty is widely regarded as one of the best value air purifiers on the market. Our research suggests it offers exceptional filtration performance for medium-sized rooms, with a 4-stage filtration system that captures 99.97% of particles as small as 0.3 microns.
pros: True HEPA filter captures 99.97% of airborne particles
Auto mode adjusts fan speed based on air quality sensor
Filter indicator light tells you exactly when to replace
Energy Star certified — very low power consumption
Compact design fits easily in most rooms
cons: Covers up to 360 sq ft — not suitable for very large rooms
Replacement filters add to long-term cost
Fan can be noisy on the highest setting
bestFor: Pet owners dealing with dander and odors
Those who want set-it-and-forget-it auto mode
verdict: The Coway Mighty is our top recommendation for anyone looking for a reliable, proven air purifier under $100. It has stood the test of time and remains a bestseller for good reason. Our research confirms it punches well above its price class.
